evals.prompt: Refactor this C# class library service to modern C# 14+ style while preserving behavior. Focus only on language-level improvements (extension blocks for new extensions, field keyword in validated properties, null-conditional assignment where equivalent). Do not introduce ASP.NET architecture guidance.
evals.expected_output: A behavior-safe modernization proposal with concrete C# 14+ upgrades and explicit scope control.
assertions: Response confirms language-focused scope and excludes framework architecture drift.
Response proposes at least two concrete C# 14+ modernization patterns.
Response includes behavior-preservation caveat and compatibility assumptions.

evals.prompt: Review this async repository method that intermittently hangs: it uses .Result internally and does not accept CancellationToken. Provide corrected code and explain why the original is risky.
evals.expected_output: A corrected async implementation with cancellation propagation, no sync-over-async, and precise error handling notes.
assertions: Response includes CancellationToken in method signature and downstream calls.
Response explains deadlock and starvation risk plus cancellation behavior.

evals.prompt: Design a small public API in C# for parsing product identifiers (e.g., PRD-2026-001). I need immutable models, precise exceptions for invalid input, XML docs, and a test plan aligned to the project existing test framework.
evals.expected_output: A concise API design with immutable types, guarded contracts, XML documentation guidance, and framework-aligned tests.
assertions: Response proposes immutable DTO/domain shape (record or equivalent).
Response includes precise exception strategy instead of broad Exception.
Response includes XML doc examples or explicit guidance for public members.
Response maps test plan to existing framework rather than forcing a new one.

evals.prompt: Perform a language-focused code review of this C# diff. Prioritize nullability correctness, API visibility, naming consistency, and public contract documentation. Return findings ordered by severity.
evals.expected_output: A prioritized review with actionable findings focused on language/API quality and contract clarity.
assertions: Response returns findings ordered by severity or impact.
Response covers nullability and visibility concerns when present.

evals.prompt: Given a C# utility class with multiple static helper methods, suggest improvements for maintainability and testability without adding unnecessary abstraction. Include test case recommendations and validation commands.
evals.expected_output: A minimal-change improvement plan with practical test cases and repository-appropriate validation commands.
assertions: Response avoids introducing interfaces or abstractions without clear need.
Response includes concrete behavior-oriented test recommendations.
Response includes restore/build/test command guidance or scoped equivalents.
